about.title: About Me
about.bio: Senior Frontend Developer with 9+ years of commercial experience building product frontend applications. Specialized in React, TypeScript, and SPA/SSR architecture. Worked with fintech and insurance products, built frontend from scratch, created internal libraries and UI kits, introduced testing and improved code quality at team and company levels.
about.bio2: I regularly take responsibility for architectural decisions, performance, developer experience, and stability of production systems. I have experience in technical leadership, code review, and developer mentoring.
